meta.title: Air Force Basic Training - An Overview
meta.description:
Have you what it take to become an Airman? Basic Military Training or BMT turns civilians into the next generation of warrior Airmen.  Over 7.5 weeks, recruits will be pushed to their limits, both physically and mentally. 

Get training advice from former Drill Instructors and recruits delivered to your Sandboxx app every week. You can also follow through this playlist to see what each week of Air Force BMT entails.

Are you or a loved one about to become the future of the Air Force?
Stay connected at every step of the Air Force journey as well as getting that training advice every week with the Sandboxx app: https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
